Title: Henry Danger
Writer: Dana Olsen, Dan Schneider, Dana Olsen
Actors: Jace Norman, Cooper Barnes, Riele Downs
Plot: Henry Danger follows the adventures of 13-year old Henry Hart whose life takes a wild turn when he gets selected by superhero Captain Man to be his apprentice. After promising to keep his new identity a secret, Henry must navigate a double life balancing the challenges of eighth grade with the crazy adventures of a crime fighter.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 18 wins & 21 nominations total
